text:
New port: science/pyNN A simulator-independent language for building neuronal network models

PyNN (pronounced 'pine' ) is a is a simulator-independent language
for building neuronal network models. 

WWW: http://neuralensemble.org/trac/PyNN

Fix: use this shar file, please.
thanks.
